title: BEM-840 agent context
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','scripts']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-25 | 12:48 (UTC+3)'
context=Path('governance/AGENT_CONTEXT.md')
context.write_text('# AGENT CONTEXT | CANONICAL START STATE'+sep+sep+'Updated: '+created+sep+sep+'## Purpose'+sep+'This file is the canonical startup context for GPT and Claude agents. New agent chats must read this file before taking development action.'+sep+sep+'## Current phase'+sep+'Roadmap: autonomous multi-agent development contour repair. Current priority: prove reliable GPT to Claude dispatch, Claude runtime state, and real Claude mailbox response.'+sep+sep+'## Required proof triad'+sep+'PASS is forbidden until all three proofs exist:'+sep+'1. workflow_dispatch_results status for Claude dispatcher.'+sep+'2. claude_inbound_mailbox_workflow_state runtime start or completion.'+sep+'3. real Claude response in governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt that is not NOT CLAUDE APPROVAL and not runtime blocker.'+sep+sep+'## Active blockers'+sep+'- Real Claude response has not been proven.'+sep+'- Protocol is not agreed until real Claude response is processed.'+sep+'- Fallback/blocker files are not Claude approval.'+sep+sep+'## Operator decisions'+sep+'1. Reports do not stop development.'+sep+'2. Operator must not be used as relay for mailbox messages.'+sep+'3. If Claude is contacted, monitoring must continue until result or a concrete blocker is repaired.'+sep+'4. Broken queue JSON must be fixed directly; one bad JSON must not kill the runner.'+sep+'5. New GPT and Claude chats need a canonical shared context file.'+sep+sep+'## Non-negotiable rules'+sep+'- No issue comments.'+sep+'- No secrets in files.'+sep+'- Do not claim PASS without evidence.'+sep+'- Do not count runtime blocker or NOT CLAUDE APPROVAL files as Claude response.'+sep+'- If a checkpoint is sent to operator, a next active task or pending artifact must already exist.'+sep+sep+'## Next action'+sep+'Continue repair loop from the latest governance/state BEM file. Prefer newest BEM state over stale handoff. If uncertain, verify proof triad and repair the first missing proof.'+sep)
state_json=Path('governance/state/agent_context.json')
state={'schema_version':'agent_context.v1','updated_at':created,'current_phase':'autonomous multi-agent development contour repair','required_proofs':['workflow_dispatch_results status for Claude dispatcher','claude_inbound_mailbox_workflow_state start or completion','real Claude response in claude_to_gpt, not blocker'], 'active_blockers':['real Claude response not proven','protocol not agreed','fallback files not approval'], 'operator_decisions':['reports do not stop development','operator is not relay','monitor Claude until result or repaired blocker','bad queue JSON must not kill runner','new agents read AGENT_CONTEXT.md'], 'next_action':'verify proof triad and repair first missing proof'}
state_json.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
updater=Path('scripts/update_agent_context.py')
updater.write_text('''#!/usr/bin/env python3\nimport json\nfrom datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone\nfrom pathlib import Path\nSEP="\\n"\nKYIV=timezone(timedelta(hours=3))\nnow=datetime.now(KYIV).strftime("%Y-%m-%d | %H:%M (UTC+3)")\nstate_dir=Path("governance/state")\nlatest=[]\nif state_dir.exists():\n    latest=sorted([p for p in state_dir.glob("bem*.json") if p.is_file()], key=lambda p: p.stat().st_mtime)[-10:]\nblockers=[]\nfor p in latest:\n    try:\n        data=json.loads(p.read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="ignore"))\n    except Exception:\n        continue\n    b=data.get("blocker")\n    if b:\n        blockers.append({"file":str(p),"blocker":b})\nctx=Path("governance/AGENT_CONTEXT.md")\ntext="# AGENT CONTEXT | CANONICAL START STATE"+SEP+SEP\ntext+="Updated: "+now+SEP+SEP\ntext+="## Purpose"+SEP+"Canonical startup context for GPT and Claude agents. Read before development action."+SEP+SEP\ntext+="## Current phase"+SEP+"Autonomous multi-agent development contour repair."+SEP+SEP\ntext+="## Required proof triad"+SEP+"1. workflow_dispatch_results status for Claude dispatcher."+SEP+"2. claude_inbound_mailbox_workflow_state runtime start or completion."+SEP+"3. real Claude response in governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt that is not NOT CLAUDE APPROVAL and not runtime blocker."+SEP+SEP\ntext+="## Latest BEM state files"+SEP\nfor p in latest:\n    text+="- `"+str(p)+"`"+SEP\ntext+=SEP+"## Active blockers"+SEP\nif blockers:\n    for b in blockers[-5:]:\n        text+="- `"+b["file"]+"`: "+json.dumps(b["blocker"],ensure_ascii=False)+SEP\nelse:\n    text+="- Verify latest proof triad; no blocker extracted from latest state files."+SEP\ntext+=SEP+"## Operator decisions"+SEP+"1. Reports do not stop development."+SEP+"2. Operator is not mailbox relay."+SEP+"3. PASS requires evidence."+SEP+"4. Bad queue JSON must not kill runner."+SEP+"5. New agents read this file first."+SEP+SEP\ntext+="## Next action"+SEP+"Verify proof triad and repair the first missing proof. No issue comments."+SEP\nctx.write_text(text,encoding="utf-8")\nPath("governance/state/agent_context.json").write_text(json.dumps({"schema_version":"agent_context.v1","updated_at":now,"latest_bem_state_files":[str(p) for p in latest],"blockers":blockers[-10:]},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+SEP,encoding="utf-8")\nprint("AGENT_CONTEXT updated at "+now)\n''')
# Add docs reference to GPT handoff if exists.
handoff=Path('GPT_HANDOFF.md')
if handoff.exists():
    ht=handoff.read_text(errors='ignore')
    line='Mandatory startup: read governance/AGENT_CONTEXT.md before development action.'
    if line not in ht:
        handoff.write_text(line+sep+ht)
# Patch curator-hourly-report workflow if present to run updater before commit/report.
wf=Path('.github/workflows/curator-hourly-report.yml')
patched=False
if wf.exists():
    txt=wf.read_text(errors='ignore')
    if 'scripts/update_agent_context.py' not in txt:
        insert='\n      - name: Update canonical agent context\n        run: python3 scripts/update_agent_context.py\n'
        marker='      - name: Commit'
        if marker in txt:
            txt=txt.replace(marker,insert+marker,1)
        else:
            txt=txt+insert
        wf.write_text(txt)
        patched=True
status='agent_context_created_and_updater_installed'
state_file=Path('governance/state/bem840_agent_context_canonical_state.json')
state_bem={'bem':'BEM-840','status':status,'context':str(context),'state_json':str(state_json),'updater':str(updater),'curator_patched':patched,'created_at':created}
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state_bem,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=Path('governance/reports/bem840_agent_context_canonical_state.md')
report.write_text('# BEM-840 | Agent Context Canonical State | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state_bem,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next.md').write_text('Next: verify AGENT_CONTEXT updater and continue proof triad repair. Operator relay forbidden.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-840'+sep+sep+'AGENT_CONTEXT created. Next: verify updater and continue proof triad repair.'+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state_bem,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/AGENT_CONTEXT.md','governance/state/agent_context.json','scripts/update_agent_context.py','governance/state/bem840_agent_context_canonical_state.json','governance/reports/bem840_agent_context_canonical_state.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']
if handoff.exists(): changed.append('GPT_HANDOFF.md')
if wf.exists(): changed.append('.github/workflows/curator-hourly-report.yml')
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Created canonical governance/AGENT_CONTEXT.md, machine-readable state, updater script, startup reference, and curator hourly update hook when workflow exists')
